# Website Platform Template

## Context and Goal

Define the website's business function and operating environment.

## System Role

Explain how the website fits into the broader system architecture.

## Stack and Rationale

Name technologies and justify each in terms of constraints.

## Technical Constraints

State non-negotiable limits and failure risks.

## Architecture and Tradeoffs

Describe key design choices and why alternatives were rejected.

## Deployment and Maintenance Model

Document release, verification, observability, and rollback strategy.

## Outcomes

Report performance, reliability, and operational impact.

## Next Iteration

Define the highest-value architectural improvement.
